input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-b142740d065f43359e45df923f2dcb76 && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:Debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG BUILD DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release /bl:Release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE BUILD DONE---"
arguments.description: Build in Debug and Release with binlogs
